channel.title: American Mineralogist
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in American Mineralogist

item.title: Thermoelasticity of phase D and implications for low-velocity anomalies and local discontinuities at the uppermost lower mantle
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2024-9305

item.title: Raman Match: Application for automated identification of minerals from Raman spectroscopy data
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9227

item.title: Estimating modal mineralogy using Raman spectroscopy: Multivariate analysis models and Raman cross-section proxies
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9224

item.title: Arsenic in pyrite acts as a catalyst for dissolution-reprecipitation reaction and gold remobilization
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9034

item.title: In-situ and ex-situ experimental investigation on the chalcopyrite replacement in saline solution at 310–365 °C and 15–25 MPa
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9136

item.title: Cassiterite and Sn mineralization in the giant Bayan Obo Fe-Nb-REE deposit, Northern China
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9149

item.title: Enrichment and fractionation of rare earth elements (REEs) in ion-adsorption-type REE deposits: Constraints of an iron (hydr)oxide-clay mineral composite
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9217

item.title: Mineral precipitation sequence from multi-stage fluids released by eclogite during high-pressure metamorphism
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9218

item.title: Miyake-jima anorthite: A lunar crustal material analog
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9122-a

item.title: Mushroom-shaped growth of crystals on the Moon
item.description: Article by Jiaxin Xi, Yiping Yang, Hongping He, Haiyang Xian, Shan Li, Xiaoju Lin, Jianxi Zhu, H. Henry Teng DOI: https://doi.org/10.2138/am-2023-9214
